- Add Story Safari Phase 1 complete implementation
  - DOM-based educational game with branching narratives
  - Vocabulary tracking system with Safari Journal
  - Accessibility-first design with WCAG 2.1 compliance

- Add comprehensive documentation suite:
  - Architecture decisions record for all major design choices
  - Educational game development best practices from WCAG research
  - Complete technical framework for future educational games
  - 16 reusable design patterns for consistent development
  - Story Safari Phase 2 enhancement roadmap
  - 3-year strategic framework roadmap through 2027

- Establish foundation for Learnimals educational game ecosystem
  - Modular component architecture for game reusability
  - Privacy-first data storage with COPPA compliance
  - Universal accessibility patterns and testing frameworks
  - Educational effectiveness measurement and analytics")

Bash(git --git-dir="/Users/austinorphan/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/src/learnimals-worktrees/experimental/.git" --work-tree="/Users/austinorphan/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/src/learnimals-worktrees/experimental" commit -m "feat: Add Ocean Adventure marine biology educational game

🌊 Complete implementation of Ocean Adventure game with:
- Canvas-based ocean exploration gameplay
- Educational marine biology content system
- Real-time species discovery mechanics
- Conservation awareness messaging
- Progressive ocean zone exploration (Surface → Twilight → Midnight → Abyssal)
- Achievement system based on ecosystem understanding

📚 Comprehensive architecture documentation:
- Architecture decisions and design patterns
- Educational content system architecture
- Performance optimization strategies
- Mobile responsiveness implementation
- Integration roadmap with BaseGame.js
- 5-phase development roadmap

🎯 Key Features:
- 8+ scientifically accurate marine species
- Real-time discovery system with educational panels
- Achievement notifications and progress tracking
- Mobile-optimized touch controls
- Accessibility features (ARIA labels, keyboard support)
- Conservation status messaging (IUCN standards)

🚀 Next Steps: Phase 1 optimization (game loop, performance)")
